svg.text: ECO-SIM: Seriema × Snakes - Seasonal Predation Clock
Dry-season hunting windows & post-fire snake exposure |

g.text: The Seriema hunts snakes by grasping then slamming them
repeatedly against rocks — unique among Neotropical birds.
In the dry season, short burnt grass maximises prey detection.
Post-fire, heat-stressed snakes bask on exposed rock.
This seasonal window regulates Cerrado snake populations,
reducing Bothrops bite risk for community members.
